channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年7月13日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Old and new apps, via modern coding agents by Terry Tao #2 AI Boosts Research Careers but Flattens Scientific Discovery #3 Understanding the Odin Programming Language #4 Gina Gallery of International Naive Art #5 Yt-Dlp Sequence Diagrams #6 Ghostel.el: Terminal emulator powered by libghostty #7 Unauthenticated RCE in Motorola's MR2600 Router #8 Vint Cerf, a “father of the Internet”, is retiring #9 Show HN: Mindwalk – Replay coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your codebase #10 Mesh LLM: distributed AI computing on iroh

item.title: 2026年7月12日（12:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 We Know Simple Fluids Can Flow. Turns Out, Some Can Fracture #2 Mesh LLM: distributed AI computing on iroh #3 Show HN: Ant – A JavaScript runtime and ecosystem #4 RISCBoy is an open-source portable games console, designed from scratch #5 What xAI's Grok Build CLI Actually Sends to xAI #6 I Did Not Kill Stanley Lieber: How to Draw (With 9front) #7 Nvidia, CoreWeave, and Nebius: Inside the Circular Financing of the GPU Boom #8 A pure scheme web programming tool #9 An agent in 100 lines of Lisp #10 Why Write Code in 2026
